name: Barrick Mining Corporation
description: Barrick Mining Corporation (renamed from Barrick Gold Corporation in May 2025) is one of the world's largest gold and copper producers, headquartered in Toronto, Canada. The company operates mines and projects across five continents including major assets in Nevada, the Dominican Republic, Mali, Tanzania, and Pakistan. Barrick produced approximately 3.9 million ounces of gold and 195,000 tonnes of copper in 2024.
